summary: This file instructs to prepare for the onboarding of three new interns starting from Monday. Tasks include assigning laptops, creating email accounts, and scheduling introductory meetings. These tasks are to be completed by Lisa before the deadline, which is this Friday.

tasks.description: Prepare for the onboarding of three new interns
Assign laptops to the new interns
Create email accounts for the new interns
Schedule introductory meetings for the new interns
